Short CV

She completed her undergraduate education at Yeditepe University, Department of Nursing and Health Services in 2013. Then, she completed her Master's degree in Health Sciences University in the Field of Public Health Nursing in 2020. Currently, Didem KURAP ÖCEBE works as a Lecturer at the Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Midwifery.
